title: SunFly
description: Adds a very lightweight /fly command. That's it!
body:
# SunFly

The best fly plugin for your minecraft server - lightweight and simple, while still being functional. Run `/fly` to fly - that's it!

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/fly` | Toggle your own flight |
| `/fly <player>` | Toggle another player's flight |

## Permissions

| Permission | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `sunfly.fly` | Toggle your own flight | op |
| `sunfly.other` | Toggle flight for other players | op |

## Roadmap 
> Small features we want to add in the future

- /flyspeed - Allows you to set your flying speed
- /tempfly - allows admins to temporarily give another play fly (either by time, until leave, etc. - this command can be disabled)

---

A plugin by [Sunset Studio](https://modrinth.com/organization/sunsets).
